Dividend yield compressed to ~4.7% from 6.7% a year ago as price rose; $144B debt remains a structural headwind despite $21.5B+ FCF guidance

trace.final_explanation: openclaw_per_ticker: 21/30 tickers produced a view via openclaw.

MRK.final_explanation: MRK has rallied 50% in 6 months while forward earnings estimates were slashed — the risk/reward has inverted.

MSFT.final_explanation: MSFT represents the most attractive risk-reward in over two years of decision history: the cheapest valuation (26.3x PE) coinciding with the strongest fundamental trajectory (39% Azure growth, expanding margins), where the selloff is macro/narrative-driven rather than fundamental.

NKE.final_explanation: NKE turnaround under Elliott Hill is progressing but far too slowly to offset margin collapse, China deterioration, and tariff headwinds — stock continues to grind lower with no visible catalyst.
